blocks.text: Praise the Lord, all you nations! Extol him, all you peoples!

Ps 117: Invitation to the nations to worship. This psalm, the Bible’s shortest, is a hymn with an invitatory phrase repeated in the last verse; it gives the motive for praise—the ’s steadfast love and faithfulness toward Israel—which is introduced by (v. 2a). Israel is a showcase for the ’s generosity and care.
For great is his steadfast love toward us, and the faithfulness of the Lord endures forever. Praise the Lord!
